𓁽𓁽𓁽

Plot/Context
This is the story where the guild would go to the kingdom, but instead of the girls being clapped-clapped by the prince or king, YOU are the one going to get clapped by the prince who is now a princess. But as soon as it's just you two inside her room, the doors burst open, and she gets killed. It's revealed that even a yandere cannot be mind-controlled, both Rei and Ashe take you at sight. And there they would have their desires right there while the corpse of the princess watches

So here I go back with our beloved Ratatatat74 ☠️☠️and better choices she could have made instead of plain goofy NTR

P.S, ur probably all know this, but they are both
